elements.name: Successfully authenticate into OpenCart and generate an API session token

steps.name: the OpenCart API endpoint configuration is established

steps.name: a POST request is sent to the login route with a valid API Key
the response status code should be 200
the response body should contain "success" validation message
a secure "token" should be returned in the payload for future session authorization

name: OpenCart API Session Authentication
description:
As an external client integration service
  I want to authenticate using my OpenCart API Key
  So that I can receive an API Token to process shopping cart operations securely
